description:
Repower an existing solar site by replacing aging photovoltaic tech with a Concentrating Solar Power (CSP) array.

1. Open the starter file: ~/Documents/Energy3D/solar-rack-array.ng3
2. Demolish the existing infrastructure by deleting all existing flat solar racks/panels from the foundation.
3. Add a new array of Parabolic Dishes to the empty foundation. Place at least 6 dishes, spaced appropriately so they do not collide.
4. Configure the parameters for ALL the new Parabolic Dishes using the properties panel:
   - Diameter: 10.0
   - Reflectance: 0.94 (94%)
5. Run the Annual Energy Analysis (Analysis > Solar Panels > Annual Yield Analysis or similar) to calculate the expected yield.
6. Save the upgraded site design to: ~/Documents/Energy3D/dish_array_upgrade.ng3
